_doc: Control-surface manifest for the anti-overfit-design-gate (D1, option A: committed glob manifest, self-included). A diff is IN SCOPE for the harness-change design gate iff it touches >=1 path matching a glob below. Globs are repo-root-relative POSIX, matched with fnmatch semantics where '**' matches across directory separators (see user/scripts/harness-gate.py::_glob_match). This manifest is ITSELF on the manifest (see the gate-own block), so widening or narrowing it is a control-surface change the gate reviews. The operator owns additions/removals; each is a gated change. Provisionally locked 2026-07-12 (NEEDS_INPUT_PROVISIONAL.md D1; ratification pending).
